purpose: Roadmap for evolving Tamandua Windows EDR detection validation toward broad enterprise coverage.

promotion_model.P0: Must become runnable and stable before beta claims.
promotion_model.P1: Needed for strong enterprise evaluation and public validation.
promotion_model.P2: Advanced coverage, deeper variants, and edge cases.

scenarios.name: Spearphishing Attachment: telemetry contract
scenarios.detection_goal: Validate raw event and canonical fields.
scenarios.alert_goal: Generate detection or explicit no-alert baseline according to variant.
scenarios.storyline_goal: Attach process, file/registry/network context and edge reason when related events exist.
scenarios.false_positive_guard: Include a benign contrast or baseline window before promotion to P0 release gate.
scenarios.product_gap_to_close: Existing profile coverage exists; verify quality gate and enrich evidence if weak.
